.github/workflows/broken-links.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions checkout action from v2 to v3 to align with current best practices.
Pin the markdown-link-check npm package to a specific version to ensure reproducible CI runs.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions runner image to the latest Ubuntu version to ensure compatibility with newer tooling and security patches.

.java-version.general_idea: Update the declared Java version in the project configuration file from 17 to 21.

pom.xml.why_exists: Older Testcontainers versions may not support Docker image architectures or features required by the new Spring Boot/Selenium stack, or may have bugs fixed in newer versions.
Selenium 4.x is required for modern browser automation compatibility; older versions may lack support for recent browser drivers or have known bugs.
Selenide 6.x is built on Selenium 4; using an older version would cause dependency conflicts or runtime errors with the upgraded Selenium version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit declaration for maven-surefire-plugin version 3.1.2.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent test execution behavior and compatibility with the new Maven/Spring Boot stack; older plugin versions might not support Java 21 test execution correctly.
Aligns with the surefire plugin version and ensures integration tests run correctly with Java 21 and the new Spring Boot stack.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Add explicit WebDriver cleanup in @AfterAll to prevent resource leaks and improve test isolation.
Add Slf4jLogConsumer to Testcontainers to enable logging of container output for debugging.
Set Selenide reports folder to a specific target directory for better artifact organization.
Rename screenshot filename to be more descriptive and unique to the test class.
Change test class visibility from public to package-private as per JUnit 5 best practices.
Configure Selenide base URL explicitly in setup instead of concatenating port in every test call.
Add Chrome option to allow remote origins for Selenide/WebDriver compatibility.
Set Selenide reports folder to target directory for screenshot storage.
Add AfterAll hook to explicitly close WebDriver to prevent resource leaks.
Rename screenshot file to be more descriptive and unique.
